title: The Ferry Across the River
content: Olivia used a ferry to cross a wide river separating two historic districts of the city. The short journey lasted only fifteen minutes, but it offered excellent views of bridges, waterfront buildings, and local landmarks. Many commuters used the ferry daily, while tourists stood outside taking photographs. Olivia enjoyed feeling the breeze and observing the city from a different perspective. Once she reached the opposite shore, she spent the afternoon exploring areas she might never have visited otherwise.
